metrics.description: Owned room count in the latest runtime KPI window.
metrics.label: Owned rooms

metrics.description: Net owned-room gain or loss across the runtime KPI window.
metrics.label: Owned-room delta

metrics.description: Reserved or remote room footprint; reducer support is still pending.
metrics.label: Reserved / remote rooms

metrics.description: Sum of latest room controller levels.
metrics.label: Controller level sum

metrics.description: Total controller progress movement across the runtime KPI window.
metrics.label: Controller progress delta

metrics.description: Energy held in room stores in the latest runtime KPI window.
metrics.label: Stored energy

metrics.description: Stored energy movement across the runtime KPI window.
metrics.label: Stored-energy delta

metrics.description: Energy currently carried by workers.
metrics.label: Worker carried energy

metrics.description: Visible dropped energy in owned rooms.
metrics.label: Dropped energy

metrics.description: Visible source count in currently observed owned rooms.
metrics.label: Source count

metrics.description: Energy harvested from runtime event totals when observed.
metrics.label: Harvested energy

metrics.description: Energy transferred from runtime event totals when observed.
metrics.label: Transferred energy

metrics.description: Spawn busy time or utilization ratio; telemetry support is pending.
metrics.label: Spawn utilization

metrics.description: Unserved spawn demand; telemetry support is pending.
metrics.label: Spawn queue pressure

metrics.description: Latest hostile creep count in observed rooms.
metrics.label: Hostile creeps

metrics.description: Latest hostile structure count in observed rooms.
metrics.label: Hostile structures

metrics.description: Attack event total across the runtime KPI window when observed.
metrics.label: Attack events

metrics.description: Attack damage total across the runtime KPI window when observed.
metrics.label: Attack damage

metrics.description: Generic destroyed-object event total; this is not enemy-kill proof.
metrics.label: Objects destroyed

metrics.description: Generic destroyed-creep event total; this can include own losses.
metrics.label: Creeps destroyed, generic

metrics.description: Ownership-aware enemy kills are not available yet.

details.reason: Generic creepDestroyedCount can include own losses; enemy_kills stays empty until an ownership-aware reducer exists.

metrics.label: Enemy kills

metrics.description: Own creep losses; ownership-aware combat reducer support is pending.
metrics.label: Own losses

metrics.description: Runtime-summary lines found by the persisted artifact feeder.
metrics.label: Runtime summary samples

metrics.description: Files matched by the persisted artifact feeder.
metrics.label: KPI artifact files

metrics.description: Minimum ticks-to-downgrade among observed controllers.
metrics.label: Downgrade risk

metrics.description: CPU used per tick; telemetry support is pending.
metrics.label: CPU used

metrics.description: CPU bucket safety; telemetry support is pending.
metrics.label: CPU bucket

metrics.description: Loop exceptions across the review window; telemetry support is pending.
metrics.label: Runtime exceptions

metrics.description: Global reset count across the review window; telemetry support is pending.
metrics.label: Global resets

metrics.description: Longest telemetry silence interval; reporter support is pending.
metrics.label: Telemetry silence

metrics.description: Known false-positive alerts; review classification support is pending.
metrics.label: Alert false positives

metrics.description: Known missed alerts; review classification support is pending.
metrics.label: Alert false negatives

metrics.description: Spawn/worker death-spiral recovery health; telemetry support is pending.
metrics.label: Worker recovery state
